_comment: Sample permission rules for CODE_PERMISSIONS_CONFIG. Copy to permissions.json and point CODE_PERMISSIONS_CONFIG at it. Matcher is tool_name(pattern). For run_command the pattern is a command prefix ('pytest:*' matches 'pytest -q', bare is exact, '*' is any). For file tools (read_file/write_file/edit_file/grep/glob) the pattern is a workspace-relative path glob ('src/**'). Precedence: deny > fence > read-only > plan-mode > ask > allow > mode-default. deny ALWAYS wins, even under bypass mode.
